docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROGRESS REPORT

LUIS VILLALOBOS APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT MANSOUR LIM IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
